attributes.action: Change the recognition of Hyperhydrosis not being recognised as a disability.
attributes.additional_details: Because I have this condition and it has ruined my entire life. I developed it when I 12 and since then I've lost jobs, relationships and friendships.
attributes.background: I want Hyperhydrosis to be recognised as a disability because with severe Hyperhydrosis lives are ruined.

rejection.details: We are no clear for what purposes you want this classification. Is it for purposes of recognition under the Equality Act, or for access to benefits or other allowances - or is it in regard to access to NHS treatments?  If you submit another petition making this clear we can take another look.
